title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 2 of 2008
text: ) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY IMPHAL : MANIPUR • ,0 RDIN ANCE I2'h September, 2008 No.2 of 2008 No. CAU/Reg/5.84/Ord/05/ : Whereas the approved Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultural University Scheme under the V Illth Five Year Plan as communicated by the Joint Secretary Department of Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary, Indian Council of Agricultural Research vide their letter number 1(2)/92-1 31 and M.(Part-II1) dated 13'h October. 190 provides for the establishment of the Central Agricultural University for North-Eastern Region with headquarters at Imphal (Manipur) having office of the Vice- Chancellor, Directorates of Instruction. Research and Extension Education, etc. and with College of Agriculture (Manipur), College of Veterinary Sciences (Mizoram), College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology (Sikkim), College of Horticulture and Forestry (Arunachal Pradesh), College of Fisheries (Tripura), College of Post-Graduate Studies and College of Home Science (Meghalaya) in the States of the North-Eastern Region as mentioned in respective parentheses: And whereas, the aforesaid sanction also provides for creation and filling of the Academic positions, such as the Director of Instruction, Director of Research and Director of Extension Education, Deans of the concerned Colleges and of Professors, Associate Professors and Assistant Professors and their equivalent academic positions. And whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education/Indian Council of Agricultural Research has approved. the issue/making of an Ordinance prescribing the academic and other qualifications for the various academic fr,Ad-P—Atet 3.? -- 1 of 4 -- and scientific positions for the Central Agricultural University vide letter No. 4 (I )194- EdnilV dated to August, 1994. And whereas. in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section 2 of 27 if C AU Act. 1992 (No. 40 of 1992) and sub-section (I) of Section 40 of the Statutes of Central yricultural Ilniversitv Act. 1992 (No. 40 of 1992). the Board of Management o 'Central Agricultural University approved the amendments regarding the experience;qualil cation of the posts of Deansf.Directors(Instruction/Extension Education/Research). Professors, Associate Professors and Assistant Professors and their equivalent academic positions in Ordinance No. 5 of 1994. Now, 1, S.N. Puri, Vice-Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, Imphal in exercise of powers conferred by sub-section 2 of section 27 of C.A.U. Act, 1992 (No. 40 of 1992) do hereby make amendments in experience/qualification for the purpose of appointment of Deans/Directors(Instructioni Extension.. EdncatiCM/Research), Deputy Directors (Instruction/Extension Education/Research), Professors, Associate Professors and Assistant Professors and equivalent as under: 1 Essential i) Doctoral' degree in relevant .subject including relevant basic sciences. ii) Minimum15 years' experience of teaching/research/ extension education in the. concerned discipline in the rank of Assistant Professor or above, out -of which at least 5 years experience as Professor/Principal Scientist in the pay scale of -Rs. 16,400-22,400 or in an equivalent position. iii) Evidence of contribution to research/teaching/extension education as supported by published work/innovations. SI. No. Post Qualification Desirable i) Experience in research management with evidence of scientific leadership, vision/perspective on agricultural research. 2. Deputy Directors (Instruction/Extension Education/ Research) cyAin eker' Essential Doctoral degree in relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with 3 years experience" (excluding the period spent in Ph.D. studies) in the relevant subject as Assistant Professor/ Scientist/Lecturer/Extension Specialist or in an equivalent I. I Deans/Directors (Instruction/Extension Education/ Research) 3 -- 2 of 4 -- Doctoral degree in relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with 3 years experience (excluding the period spent in Ph.D. studies) in the relevant subject as Assistant Professor/ Scientist/Lecturer/Extension Specialist or in an equivalent position in the pay scale of Rs.8,000-13,500/- having made contribution to reSearch/teachinglextsion education as evidenced by published work/ innovations. 4. Associate Professort,and I Essential equivalent ) . _ position in the pa scale of Rs.8.000-1.1.500 - having made contribution to researchiteachingl extension education as evidenced by published work/ innovations. Desirable i) Experience in research management with evidence of scientific leadership visioniperspedi c on 3ndinult oral I research. 3. Professors/Chairman I Essential and equivalent i) Doctoral degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences. ii) 10 years experience in research/teaching/extension education in the Agricultural University/ National Research System provided 3 years experience is as Associate Professor/Senior Scientist (12.000-18,300) or in an equivalent position. iii) Evidence of contribution to research/teaching/extension education as supported by published work/innovations. Desirable i) Adequate experience of teaching and guiding Post- Graduate students. ii) Specialization (to be defined) OR Doctoral degree in the relevant subject including relevant basic sciences with 3 years experience (excluding the period spent in Ph.D. studies) of high quality post — doctoral research in a scientific institution as evidenced by publications in high impact/renowned journals. Act, 1984 and registered with the State Veterinary Council / Veterinary Council of India* Desirable Specialization (to be defined) R:erakatiou fur Biochemistry.
